blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-03-04.
9,633 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-03 -> 2026-03-04)

- "Who will Donald Trump name to replace Kristi Noem as US homeland security secretary by March 2026?" → Markwayne Mullin
- "What coalition will Donald Trump announce to fight drug cartels at a South Florida summit by March 2026?" → Americas Counter-Cartel Coalition
- "Which capital city will see homes near the US Embassy ordered evacuated during the regional conflict by 6th March 2026?" → Doha
- "What Saudi city will authorities say was hit by a deadly military projectile by March 8, 2026?" → Al-Kharj
- "Which Gulf country will report that an Iranian missile hit a state-run oil refinery by March 6, 2026?" → Bahrain
- "Alongside Jeff Merkley, who will co-introduce, by March 2026, a US Senate bill to stop top federal officials from trading on prediction markets?" → Amy Klobuchar
- "Which military will a preliminary US Department of Defense investigation identify as responsible for the deadly school strike in southern Iran by 11 March 2026?" → US military
- "What town southwest of Tehran will Iranian state media identify as the place where two schools were hit by missiles by March 31, 2026?" → Parand

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (239 resolved, 91 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
